changeSet.author: you
changeSet.sql:
CREATE TABLE public.user_locations ( id bigint NOT NULL, user_id bigint NOT NULL, name character varying NOT NULL, latitude double precision NOT NULL, longitude double precision NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY (id), CONSTRAINT fk FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES public.users (id) MATCH SIMPLE ON UPDATE NO ACTION ON DELETE NO ACTION NOT VALID );
ALTER TABLE IF EXISTS public.locations OWNER to postgres;
